samples.text: Alice is taller than Bob. Bob is taller than Charlie. Is Alice taller than Charlie?
Alice has greater height than Bob. Bob has greater height than Charlie. Does Alice have greater height than Charlie?
Bob is shorter than Alice. Charlie is shorter than Bob. Is Charlie shorter than Alice?
Alice ranks above Bob in height. Bob ranks above Charlie in height. Does Alice rank above Charlie in height?

If one person is taller than a second person, and the second person is taller than a third person, then the first person is taller than the third person. Alice is taller than Bob, and Bob is taller than Charlie. Is Alice taller than Charlie?
Alice is taller than Bob. The sky is often blue. Bob is taller than Charlie. Is Alice taller than Charlie?
